topic: Validate and stress-test the merge design for folding deep-loop-runtime into deep-loop-workflows as system-deep-loop: structural layout, bidirectional path-coupling repair, the system-spec-kit tooling-borrow, reference migration across commands/agents/READMEs/advisor-corpus, and whether fallback-router.ts should be wired for real GLM-5.2 to MiMo-v2.5-Pro fallback.

normalized_topic: validate and stress-test the merge design for folding deep-loop-runtime into deep-loop-workflows as system-deep-loop

reason: detached fan-out lineage write boundary forbids writes outside artifact_dir

noveltyJustification: First pass; layout validated as sound, and two new gaps surfaced: the YAML spec.md mutation branch is not gated on the fan-out boundary, and the REQ-002 convergence-floor test hardcodes the old skill name.

ruledOut.reason: category error; blurs backend infra with public workflow modes
N replicas race on the same generated fence

graphEvents.label: Is the structural layout mechanically safe?
YAML spec.md mutation not gated on fan-out boundary

noveltyJustification: Directional rule confirmed correct, but Class B inventory omits 4+ relative-hop seams AND a distinct third repair class: repo-root absolute existence-probe path construction in replay-graph-from-artifacts.cjs, which breaks silently rather than crashing.

ruledOut.approach: replay-graph as a Class B relative-hop site
ruledOut.reason: uses repo-root absolute path construction via existence probe, a different repair shape

ruledOut.approach: global find/replace of deep-loop-runtime in council tests
ruledOut.reason: many hits are semantic test data, not skill-location references

graphEvents.label: repo-root absolute existence-probe is a third path-repair class

focus: system-spec-kit tooling-borrow and external reference migration
noveltyJustification: Confirmed the four Stage 3b edits and the advisor-codegen risk, then added three net-new risks: a silent test-glob-shrink gate, a divergence-ledger reason-prose staleness, and a named benchmark profile file with ambiguous rename target.

ruledOut.approach: decouple runtime TS tooling from system-spec-kit during merge
ruledOut.reason: merge failure and decoupling failure would be indistinguishable

ruledOut.approach: dynamic mode-registry reads on advisor hot path
ruledOut.reason: intentional cross-skill-import-coupling avoidance; drift-guard is the safety net

graphEvents.label: vitest.config include glob can silently shrink test:council
deep-loop-runtime.json profile has ambiguous rename target

focus: Fallback-router wiring feasibility for GLM-5.2 to MiMo-v2.5-Pro
noveltyJustification: Confirmed zero-caller state and the GLM/MiMo distinct-pool pairing; net-new finding that classifyLineageFailure routes quota/auth to FATAL before retry exhaustion, making a single-call-site wiring unreachable for the exact failure mode it targets.

ruledOut.reason: unreachable for quota/auth class; classifyLineageFailure marks those FATAL before retry exhaustion
fallback-router rejects same-pool by graph validation

graphEvents.label: classifyLineageFailure quota/auth FATAL gap blocks fallback reachability

focus: Consolidation, residual risks, and execution order
noveltyJustification: Primarily re-ranked prior findings into per-child revision lists R1-R11; net-new information limited to the agent-mirror breadth (5 deep agents x 2 runtimes) and the sibling-graph edge-collapse confirmation.

ruledOut.approach: renaming /deep:* commands or public agent names
ruledOut.reason: skill identity changes, public command/agent surfaces stay stable
resolveFallback rejects unapproved substitutions by design

graphEvents.label: detached fan-out spec.md write-back gap is a cross-cutting deep-loop-runtime tooling risk
